projectDescription: A comprehensive Yiddish grammar and spelling handbook for writers and proofreaders.
keyFeatures: Comprehensive coverage of Yiddish parts of speech (nouns, verbs, adjectives, pronouns, adverbs, prepositions, conjunctions)
Detailed verb conjugation rules for present, past, and future tenses
In-depth guide to Yiddish prefixes, suffixes, and compound words
Sentence structure analysis with subjects, direct and indirect objects
Practical writing tips for Yiddish proofreaders and editors
Overview of Yiddish dictionaries and reference resources
Discussion of standardization and grammar rules for the Haredi/Orthodox community
Cultural and historical context for Yiddish grammar conventions
publicApiSurface: Parts of speech taxonomy (nouns, verbs, adjectives, adverbs, pronouns, prepositions, conjunctions)
Verb conjugation tables (present, past, future tenses)
Noun declension by grammatical case (nominative, accusative, dative)
